notes: Game runs fine, however videos and background music do not play. The game will skip over videos entirely. Fully playable otherwise as far as I can tell, made it past Oakvale which was not possible on older versions of Wine.
title: Fable - The Lost Chapters

notes: Game runs, however the fps is bad, the refresh rate doesn't seem to apply (game offers up to 100hz) and controls are not smooth at all. All music and pre-rendered videos don't play. I guess it is possible to finish playing the game though.
title: Fable - The Lost Chapters

notes: Game runs. No videos though. Sound is sometimes missing. I can save once - but subsequent saves fail regardless if overwriting or creating a new save. If I use Steam's 'Verify Integrity of Game Files...' feature there is always one file that fails and must be reacquired. My Wacom Cintiq Monitor's USB cord must be unplugged in order to navigate through in game menus. Otherwise the focused option automatically scrolls to the uppermost option in the menu. Hopefully the Anniversary edition has better results.
title: Fable - The Lost Chapters
